header.title: Research
header.description: Blend qualitative and quantitative inputs to shape the roadmap, reduce risk, and advocate for customer value.

sections.title: Intake & scoping
sections.description: Capture the problem space, audience, and desired outcomes before you field a study or workshop.

sections.title: Field and synthesize
sections.description: Use moderated sessions, surveys, and usability testing to collect evidence and translate observations into insights.

sections.title: Operationalize learnings
sections.description: Share readouts, update artifacts, and align backlog priorities so teams can execute with confidence.
